title: Posting on Social Media 社交媒体发照片
scene: 两个朋友讨论发社交媒体照片

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: Hey, I just posted our trip photos on Instagram. Did you see them?
lines.trans: 嘿，我刚把我们的旅行照片发在Instagram上了。你看到了吗？

lines.speaker: Friend B
lines.line: Yes! That sunset photo is amazing. Which filter did you use?
lines.trans: 看到了！那张日落照片太美了。你用了什么滤镜？

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: I used "Warm Glow." It made the colors look really nice.
lines.trans: 我用的"Warm Glow"滤镜。让颜色看起来很好看。

lines.speaker: Friend B
lines.line: Can you tag me? I want to share it on my story too.
lines.trans: 你能标记我吗？我也想分享到我的快拍上。

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: I already tagged you. Check your notifications.
lines.trans: 我已经标记你了。去看看你的通知。

lines.speaker: Friend B
lines.line: Oh, there it is. But wait, I look a little weird in the third photo. Can you crop it?
lines.trans: 哦，看到了。等等，第三张照片里我看起来有点奇怪。你能裁剪一下吗？

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: No worries. I will delete that one and post a better version.
lines.trans: 没问题。我删掉那张，发一个更好的版本。

lines.speaker: Friend B
lines.line: Thanks. You always take the best pictures.
lines.trans: 谢谢。你总是拍出最好的照片。

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: We make a great team. Next time, you take the photos and I will smile!
lines.trans: 我们配合得很好。下次你来拍照，我来笑！
